name: Maple Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder and salt.
2. Beat egg whites in a large mixing bowl until foamy.
3. Add cream of tartar and 1/4 cup maple syrup to the egg whites. Beat until the whites form stiff peaks.
4. In a small bowl, combine egg yolks, 3/4 cup maple syrup, vanilla and sifted dry ingredients.
5. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes.
6. Gently fold the egg mixture into the beaten egg whites.
7. Pour batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 45 minutes.
9. Invert the cake onto a wire rack to cool.
